task_objective: Validate and harden correlation sampling parameters (Issue #12)
design_decisions: Implemented early validation in Profiler constructor to catch invalid user inputs.
Reset invalid values to sensible defaults (1,000,000) instead of throwing exceptions.
Stored validation warnings in a list and appended them to the report analysis metadata in run().
Added a null-check guard for row_count in CorrelationEngine to avoid ZeroDivisionError.
results: Successfully implemented validation and hardening. All 157 tests passed. PR #17 opened.
